matched_template.title: Thin-film anti-reflection coating
matched_template.natural_language_goal_en: Design a local preview for a single-layer anti-reflection coating on glass at 550 nm, estimate the quarter-wave thickness, and inspect a wavelength sweep without running solvers.
matched_template.natural_language_goal_zh: 为玻璃基底上的单层增透薄膜做本地预览设计，目标波长 550 nm，估算四分之一波厚度，并查看反射率随波长变化，不运行外部求解器。
default_assumptions: Single-layer quarter-wave helper before any validated stack model.

source_model.notes: Normal-incidence plane-wave preview for thin-film reflectance/transmittance.

monitor_model.notes: Local calculator output, not an external solver monitor.

default_source_assumptions: Default wavelength sweep is 400-800 nm with a 550 nm design point.
default_monitor_assumptions: Default observable is reflectance/transmittance from local thin-film preview formulas.
matched_template.evidence_boundary: Sanity-checked preview formulas only; verify material constants and stack physics before conclusions.
next_actions: Confirm coating material/index and substrate index.
Inspect spectrum and quarter-wave helper output.
Use validated thin-film tooling later if physical conclusions are needed.

optical_language_summary.material_system: SiO2/TiO2/Al2O3 preview coating candidates on glass
optical_language_summary.solver_or_adapter_family: local thin-film calculator; future TMM adapter candidate
optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Sanity-checked preview formulas only; verify material constants and stack physics before conclusions.

diagnostics: Matched with deterministic keyword heuristics; no external LLM was called.
Template outputs are preview/design-assist and require human review.
